privileged_info_summary: The manuscript submission tracker task is a synthetic data cleaning exercise with 24 literary manuscript submissions to 10 science fiction/fantasy publications. The dataset contains 6 accepted submissions (25% overall acceptance rate), 10 rejected submissions, and 7 pending submissions. The data exhibits multiple quality issues: 14 different non-canonical status values (ranging from abbreviations like 'R', 'acc', to informal terms like 'No thanks', 'Pass'), consistent YYYY-MM-DD submission date format, and 17 records with response dates. Average response time across all publications is 70.8 days, with Lightspeed Magazine showing the fastest response (36 days) and Analog Science Fiction the slowest (103.5 days average). The task requires standardizing status values to four canonical types (Accepted, Rejected, Pending, Withdrawn), calculating days-to-response formulas, and generating publication-level statistics including acceptance rates and average response times. Verification uses 8 criteria with a 75% pass threshold.
